ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "incident_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident */,
  "incident_report" TEXT /* Detailed report of the incident */,
  "report_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the incident was reported */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the incident occurred */,
  "affected_counties" TEXT /* Counties affected by the incident */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporter who submitted the incident report */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident cause */,
  "volume_spilled" TEXT /* Volume of the spill */,
  "containment_status" TEXT /* Status of containment (e.g., contained, uncontained) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES incident_causes ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES reporters ("reporter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the facility */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., wastewater treatment plant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporters" (
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporter */,
  "reporter_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporter */,
  "reporter_title" TEXT /* Title of the reporter */,
  "reporter_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reporter */,
  "reporter_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the reporter */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the reporter represents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_locations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident cause */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident cause */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident cause */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cleanup_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleanup action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the cleanup action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cleanup action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_cleanup" (
  "cleanup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleanup effort */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being cleaned up */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cleanup action being taken */,
  "start_date_time" TEXT /* Start date and time of the cleanup effort */,
  "end_date_time" TEXT /* End date and time of the cleanup effort */,
  "cleanup_status" TEXT /* Status of the cleanup effort (e.g., in-progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cleanup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_cleanup_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES cleanup_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_cleanup_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reporter, facility operator, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being notified */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Name of the agency or authority being notified */,
  "notification_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, phone, mail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_notifications_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_migrations" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being migrated */,
  "migrated_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the incident was migrated */,
  "migrated_county" TEXT /* County to which the incident was migrated */,
  "migration_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the migration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_migrations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the document */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., report, image) */,
  "upload_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_documents_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_comments_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
